title: Dry Swab Sampling and Transportation
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"cfj8a","text":"Protocols for samping and shipping human skin swabs from clinics to lab.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Designate a location to be swabbed, taking care to note the size of the area. Remove the swab from the tube, swab the entire area in a zigzag pattern, rolling the swab over to ensure the entire swab is used.
Carefully insert the swab into the tube, making sure to seat the cap firmly on the tube. Label the sample with a unique identifier, such as the patient_ID, location the sample was taken, the date.
Place samples and all paperwork in Styrofoam container and arrange shipment for next day delivery. Do not ship over the weekend.
creator: Chunan Liu
